title: mentha aquatica var. affinis
intro: Mentha aquatica var. affinis, also known as American water mint or river mint, is a variant of the water mint plant that is native to North America. This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic and an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. affinis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from headaches and sore throats. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
